Name: curvature_aware_optimization
Title: Curvature-Aware Precision Routing for Machine Learning
Short Hypothesis: By incorporating curvature information into precision routing, we can improve the efficiency and accuracy of machine learning models.
Related Work: Recent works like Spectral Latent Steering have explored test-time optimization, but our proposal focuses on curvature-aware precision routing, integrating architectural theory and algorithmic guarantees for improved efficiency and accuracy.
Abstract: This proposal introduces a curvature-aware precision routing framework for machine learning. By adaptively adjusting precision based on loss landscape curvature, our approach improves efficiency and accuracy. We will demonstrate its effectiveness through empirical evaluation and provide theoretical performance guarantees.
Experiments: Evaluate the proposed framework on image classification and natural language processing tasks
Compare performance with state-of-the-art baselines using metrics like accuracy, efficiency, and robustness
Investigate the impact of different curvature estimation methods and precision routing strategies
Risk Factors and Limitations: Potential added computational overhead from curvature estimation
Need for careful tuning and validation of curvature estimation and precision routing
